import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { OperatorFunction, SchedulerLike } from '../types'; export declare function windowTime<T>(windowTimeSpan: number, scheduler?: SchedulerLike): OperatorFunction<T, Observable<T>>; export declare function windowTime<T>(windowTimeSpan: number, windowCreationInterval: number, scheduler?: SchedulerLike): OperatorFunction<T, Observable<T>>; export declare function windowTime<T>(windowTimeSpan: number, windowCreationInterval: number | null | void, maxWindowSize: number, scheduler?: SchedulerLike): OperatorFunction<T, Observable<T>>; //# sourceMappingURL=windowTime.d.ts.map
